_comment: Contacts-only extraction schema for the ESS / pre-CD page-5 Contact Information table. Sourced from catchingDoc DocumentType 'Estimated Settlement Statement' (NOT the stale 'ESS' alias). Types are nullable ([type,'null']) so empty Contact-Information columns (e.g. Mortgage Broker) pass LandingAI's output validation instead of discarding the whole result (HTTP 206). Used by shared/ess_contact_bypass.py when the catchingDoc finder won't bind a CD-format pre-CD.

contact_mortgage_broker_contact_nmls_id.description: Contact Information table — Mortgage Broker column — Contact NMLS ID number. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

contact_real_estate_broker_seller_contac.description: Contact Information table — Real Estate Broker (S) / Seller column — Contact State License ID number. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

contact_real_estate_broker_seller_email.description: Contact Information table — Real Estate Broker (S) / Seller column — Email address. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

contact_settlement_agent_st_license_id.description: Contact Information table — Settlement Agent column — State License ID number. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

contact_settlement_agent_contact_nmls_id.description: Contact Information table — Settlement Agent column — Contact NMLS ID number. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

contact_settlement_agent_file_number.description: The settlement / escrow File number shown in the 'Closing Information' header of the settlement statement / Closing Disclosure, labeled 'File #' (e.g. 'File #: 2610313'). This is the escrow case / file number that goes in the Escrow Company's 'Escrow Case #' field — NOT a license, NMLS, or loan number. Return null if not present.

contact_real_estate_broker_buyer_phone.description: Contact Information table — Real Estate Broker (B) / Buyer column — Phone number. Found on the last page of the ESS. Return null if not present.

escrow_company.description: Name of the escrow company. Often same as title company.

title_company.description: Name of the title company (e.g., 'Old Republic Title Company of Nevada'). Used for SSPL 'Borrower Did Shop' comparison.
